name: notipo
description: Notipo — publish blog posts to WordPress. Creates a Notion page, triggers the publishing pipeline, syncs to WordPress automatically.
notes: Pro features: image generation, sync-now (15s cooldown)
All responses wrapped in { data: ... } on success, { message: '...' } on error

endpoints.description: Create a blog post — creates Notion page and triggers publishing pipeline

body.title: string (required) — post title
body.body: string (optional) — markdown content with headings and images
body.seoKeyword: string (optional) — focus keyword for SEO plugins
body.images: object[] (optional) — Unsplash images with query and afterHeading (Pro)

endpoints.description: Trigger immediate Notion poll (Pro only, 15s cooldown)
List all posts with status and sync history
Delete post and clean up WordPress media
List sync and publish jobs. Statuses: PENDING, RUNNING, COMPLETED, FAILED
Get Notion and WordPress connection status
View plan, usage, and trial info

example.create_post: curl -X POST https://notipo.com/api/posts/create -H 'X-API-Key: $NOTIPO_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title": "My Post", "body": "# Hello\nContent here", "publish": true}'
